qa_pairs.question: What is the certificate number for this group term life insurance certificate?
qa_pairs.evidence: Certificate No: AGB-GT-2024-TechCorp-00842

qa_pairs.question: What is the basic life insurance benefit amount?
qa_pairs.evidence: Basic Life Insurance: 2x Annual Salary = $180,000

qa_pairs.question: What is the voluntary additional coverage amount?
qa_pairs.evidence: Voluntary Additional Coverage: $100,000 (employee-elected)

qa_pairs.question: What is the total coverage amount?
qa_pairs.evidence: Total Coverage: $280,000

qa_pairs.question: What is the employee's monthly premium contribution for voluntary coverage?
qa_pairs.evidence: Premium Contribution: Employer pays basic; employee pays $12/month for voluntary coverage

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum accelerated death benefit amount?
qa_pairs.evidence: 7.2 Maximum acceleration: $250,000

qa_pairs.question: What percentage of the death benefit may be accelerated under the terminal illness provision?
qa_pairs.evidence: 7.1 If you are diagnosed with a terminal illness with life expectancy of 12 months or less, you may request acceleration of up to 75% of your death benefit.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum total coverage allowed under this certificate?
qa_pairs.evidence: 3.4 MAXIMUM BENEFIT: Total coverage cannot exceed $1,000,000.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum conversion amount available under the conversion privilege?
qa_pairs.answer: The lesser of group coverage or $200,000
qa_pairs.evidence: 5.3 The conversion policy will be issued at: Maximum amount: Lesser of group coverage or $200,000

qa_pairs.question: What is the issue date of this certificate?
qa_pairs.evidence: Issue Date: June 1, 2024

qa_pairs.question: What is the employee's department?
qa_pairs.evidence: Department: Software Engineering

qa_pairs.question: Within how many business days will benefits be paid after receipt of complete claim documentation?
qa_pairs.evidence: 10.4 Benefits will be paid within 10 business days of receipt of complete claim documentation.

qa_pairs.question: What is the suicide exclusion period under this group certificate?
qa_pairs.answer: 12 months from the coverage effective date
qa_pairs.evidence: 8.1 SUICIDE: If death occurs by suicide within 12 months of the coverage effective date, we will not pay a death benefit.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the employer policyholder?
qa_pairs.evidence: TechCorp Industries, Inc.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the primary beneficiary?
qa_pairs.evidence: Primary: Jordan Casey Taylor (Spouse) - 100%

qa_pairs.question: Who is the contingent beneficiary?
qa_pairs.evidence: Contingent: Taylor Family Revocable Trust - 100%

qa_pairs.question: What insurance company provides this group coverage?
qa_pairs.evidence: Alliance Group Benefits

qa_pairs.question: What governs in case of conflict between the certificate and the master policy?
qa_pairs.answer: The Master Policy controls in case of any conflict with the certificate.
qa_pairs.evidence: 1.2 The Master Policy controls in case of any conflict with this certificate.

qa_pairs.question: How is the basic life benefit amount calculated?
qa_pairs.answer: The basic benefit equals 2 times the employee's annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000.
qa_pairs.evidence: 3.1 BASIC LIFE: Your basic benefit equals 2 times your annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000.

qa_pairs.question: Where should beneficiaries submit claims?
qa_pairs.answer: Alliance Group Benefits - Claims Department, 1200 Insurance Plaza, Dallas, TX 75201
qa_pairs.evidence: 10.3 Submit claims to: Alliance Group Benefits - Claims Department, 1200 Insurance Plaza, Dallas, TX 75201

qa_pairs.question: What happens to coverage if the employee ceases active full-time employment?
qa_pairs.answer: Coverage terminates on the date the employee ceases active full-time employment.
qa_pairs.evidence: 4.1 Your coverage terminates on the earliest of: (c) The date you cease active full-time employment

qa_pairs.question: If the employee leaves employment, how many days does the employee have to port coverage?
qa_pairs.answer: The employee must apply within 31 days of termination of employment.
qa_pairs.evidence: 6.3 You must apply within 31 days of termination of employment.

qa_pairs.question: If the employee becomes totally disabled before age 60 and remains disabled for 6 months, what happens to voluntary life insurance premiums?
qa_pairs.answer: The voluntary life insurance premiums will be waived.
qa_pairs.evidence: 11.1 If you become totally disabled before age 60 and remain disabled for 6 consecutive months, your voluntary life insurance premiums will be waived.

qa_pairs.question: When does the premium waiver benefit end?
qa_pairs.answer: Waiver ends when the employee returns to work, recovers, or reaches age 65.
qa_pairs.evidence: 11.4 Waiver ends when you return to work, recover, or reach age 65.

qa_pairs.question: If the employee's group coverage terminates for non-payment of premium, can the employee convert to an individual policy?
qa_pairs.answer: No. The conversion privilege is available only if group coverage terminates for any reason except non-payment of premium.
qa_pairs.evidence: 5.1 If your group coverage terminates for any reason except non-payment of premium, you may convert to an individual whole life policy without evidence of insurability.

qa_pairs.question: Does this group policy have pre-existing condition exclusions?
qa_pairs.answer: No. Group coverage has no pre-existing condition exclusions.
qa_pairs.evidence: 8.2 PRE-EXISTING CONDITION LIMITATION: None. Group coverage has no pre-existing condition exclusions.

qa_pairs.question: If the employee is diagnosed with a terminal illness and accelerates 75% of the death benefit, how much death benefit will the beneficiaries ultimately receive?
qa_pairs.answer: The beneficiaries will receive only 25% of the original death benefit, since any amount accelerated reduces the death benefit payable to beneficiaries.
qa_pairs.evidence: 7.1 If you are diagnosed with a terminal illness with life expectancy of 12 months or less, you may request acceleration of up to 75% of your death benefit. / 7.4 Any amount accelerated reduces the death benefit payable to beneficiaries.

qa_pairs.question: If the employee leaves employment and wants to continue coverage without a medical exam, which option is appropriate — conversion or portability?
qa_pairs.answer: Both conversion and portability are available without evidence of insurability. Conversion provides an individual whole life policy up to $200,000; portability continues the same group amount at age-banded rates.
qa_pairs.evidence: 5.1 If your group coverage terminates for any reason except non-payment of premium, you may convert to an individual whole life policy without evidence of insurability. / 6.5 Evidence of insurability is NOT required for portability.

qa_pairs.question: How is the basic life benefit recalculated when the employee receives a salary increase?
qa_pairs.answer: The basic benefit is recalculated annually on the policy anniversary based on the employee's current salary (2x annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000).
qa_pairs.evidence: 3.3 SALARY CHANGES: Your basic benefit will be recalculated annually on your policy anniversary based on your current salary. / 3.1 BASIC LIFE: Your basic benefit equals 2 times your annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000.

qa_pairs.evidence: N/A
